cityDNA.coreFantasy: A bearfolk mountain fortress-city where border walls, forges, command bastions, caravan roads, containment keeps, ancestor guidance, and a salmon-stone lodge make strength protective and territorial.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Orsakar is not a bear barbarian settlement; it is a blue-granite civic fortress whose strength is organized into walls, work, route law, custody, and ancestor-bound public authority.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Orsakar turns bearfolk mass, mountain thresholds, forge discipline, caravan endurance, command order, and containment ethics into a mature civic system.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Blue granite, frost glass, pine, silver inlay, arcane glow, cliff terraces, snowy approaches, border beacons, forge smoke, command banners, caravan gates, containment yards, and bear-claw registry marks.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Bear-like beastfolk with formal institutions, ancestor guidance, weather binding, guarded roads, and a public expectation that strength must protect.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Bear claws, palefangs, salmon stone, border lamps, forge smoke, command standards, caravan gates, mist veils, and judgment yards symbolize strength under obligation.

canonLocks: Orsakar is a mature bear-like beastfolk fortress city, not a generic mountain beast camp.
The Wonder is Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs.
The Beacon is Border Wall Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court.
The five primary districts are Fortress / Border Wall, Heavy Industry / Foundry, Military Command, Transit / Caravan / Rail, and Prison / Containment.

The uploaded district anchors include Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook, Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook, Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Standard Tower Nook, Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Waystation Hall Nook, Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, and Judgment Yard Nook.
provisionalCanon: Orsakar's highest civic virtue is protective strength.
The contact-sheet pass shows cold mountain scale, fortress massing, and street-level institutions aligned with the sidecar anchors.
rejectedReads: all brute strength with no institutions
mountain scenery without road, command, or containment systems
cautionFlags: Keep blue granite, frost glass, pine, and silver inlay visible.
Containment is an institution, not random cruelty.

environment.environmentalLogic: The uploaded images show cliff, cold, pine, and blue stone as civic infrastructure: approaches are defended, roads are governed, and heavy buildings read as deliberate protection.

forms: Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs
Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court
skyline: Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs as wonder anchor
Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court as seat of power
Border Wall Beacon as public signal
forge stacks, command bastions, caravan gates, and containment keeps stepping down mountain terraces

civilization.people: Bearfolk citizens read as massive, deliberate, territorial, and institutionally ordered; the images emphasize civic density, guarded gates, and work districts rather than wilderness wandering.
civilization.governance: The Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court governs border rights, work obligations, road passage, command orders, and containment judgments.
civilization.religion: Ancestor guidance and weather binding appear through palefang marks, salmon-stone rites, bear-claw registry symbols, and mountain threshold oaths.

streets.appearance: Cold, heavy, blue-granite streets with pine structures, silver inlay, guard towers, forge smoke, command banners, caravan yards, and containment thresholds.
streets.movement: Movement follows defended gates, mountain stairs, forge lanes, command platforms, caravan roads, and warded containment approaches.
streets.lighting: Blue civic light and snow reflection contrast with orange forges and pale containment wards.
streets.weatherEffects: Snow, fog, and cold make gates, roads, and signal lamps essential.
streets.dayCycle: Daytime centers on wall watch, forge work, command traffic, and caravan processing.
streets.nightCycle: Night is beacon-lit, guarded, forge-warm, and containment-watchful.

housing.wealthy: Registry and command terraces with frost-glass windows and guarded views.
housing.middle: Forge, caravan, and watch-family homes along heavy roads.
housing.poor: Cold service housing near walls, work yards, and road thresholds.

districts.name: Fortress / Border Wall
districts.civicPurpose: Public access control, warning, and defense.
districts.visualIdentity: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.

districts.name: Heavy Industry / Foundry
districts.visualIdentity: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.

districts.name: Military Command
districts.civicPurpose: Rank, orders, musters, and disciplined force.
districts.visualIdentity: Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Woven Banners Monument, Standard Tower Nook.

districts.name: Transit / Caravan / Rail
districts.civicPurpose: Route law, trade exchange, and road endurance.
districts.visualIdentity: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.

districts.name: Prison / Containment
districts.civicPurpose: Custody, judgment, danger management, and institutional consequence.
districts.visualIdentity: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.

wonder.name: Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs
wonder.symbolicRole: Bearfolk ancestral strength made civic shelter.
wonder.visualRole: Wonder-scale lodge in blue granite, frost glass, pine, and silver inlay above the mountain city.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide site for oath, ancestor rite, seasonal gathering, and public identity.
storyHooks: A palefang rite decides whether strength protects or possesses.

beacon.name: Border Wall Beacon
beacon.visualRole: Blue-lit warning landmark integrated with wall, banners, and watch bastions.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates watch, forge, command, caravan, and containment response.
storyHooks: A Beacon change makes every road and gate answer at once.

seatOfPower.name: Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Strength, record, and ancestor mark made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central registry court with bear-claw marks, terraces, archives, command platforms, and silver-inlaid stone.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Handles rulings, road rights, custody, command obligations, and public records.
storyHooks: A claw mark in the registry assigns a duty nobody can lift alone.

majorLandmarks.name: Great Forge
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Forge halls, smoke stacks, crucible court, and blue granite yards.
storyHooks: A forge delay threatens the wall.

majorLandmarks.name: Command Bastion
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Bastion with standards, banners, and command platforms.
storyHooks: A standard rises before the road is safe.

majorLandmarks.name: Caravanserai
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Road and guest right under watch.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Waystation, banners, caravan yards, and gate roads.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Travel, trade, lodging, and route law.
storyHooks: A caravan guest record changes who Orsakar must protect.

majorLandmarks.name: Containment Keep
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Warded keep with mist veils, judgment yard, bells, and cell blocks.
storyHooks: A judgment yard record proves containment was mercy once.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.
S2: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.
S3: Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Woven Banners Monument, Standard Tower Nook.
S4: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.
S5: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs, Border Wall Beacon, and Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court legible together.
Use blue granite, frost glass, pine, silver inlay, cold mountain roads, forges, command banners, caravan gates, and containment yards.
requiredVisualElements: Bearfolk Salmon-Stone Lodge of the Palefangs
Bear Claw Marks Sovereign Registry Court
elementsToAvoid: mountain scenery with no road law
